name: webnovel-writer
description: Long-form Chinese webnovel writing system with skills, runtime checks, RAG, memory, and dashboard.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, write, review, query, and inspect long-form webnovel projects
interface.longDescription: Use Webnovel Writer to initialize Chinese webnovel projects, plan volumes and chapters, write and review chapters, query story state, maintain long-term memory, and open a read-only dashboard while reusing the same Python runtime across hosts.
defaultPrompt: Use Webnovel Writer to inspect this novel project.
Run a webnovel doctor check for the current project.
Help me plan the next webnovel volume.
